task: Pick the orange and yellow blocks and put them in the bowl
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A black bowl is on a wooden table. Near it are two small blocks: an orange one and a yellow one. The blocks are rigid and cube-shaped. The bowl is a container with an open top. **STRATEGY -** First, pick up the orange block, then the yellow block, and place both into the bowl. The order of picking the blocks can be either orange first or yellow first. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach for the orange block at its body. Step 2: Grasp the orange block at its body. Step 3: Transport the orange block to the bowl's interior. Step 4: Place the orange block inside the bowl. Step 5: Reach for the yellow block at its body. Step 6: Grasp the yellow block at its body. Step 7: Transport the yellow block to the bowl's interior. Step 8: Place the yellow block inside the bowl.

Goal: all_inside({orange_block, yellow_block}, bowl)
Scene: black_bowl, orange_block, yellow_block, table
Step 1: reach(orange_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, orange_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, orange_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange block
  contact: holding(orange_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange_block)
Step 3: transport(orange_block -> bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  spatial: inside(orange_block, bowl) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange_block)
  done_when: inside(orange_block, bowl)
Step 4: place(orange_block -> bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  contact: surface_contact(orange_block, bowl) [completion]; released(orange_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(orange_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange_block, bowl) AND released(orange_block)
Step 5: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 7: transport(yellow_block -> bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  spatial: inside(yellow_block, bowl) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: inside(yellow_block, bowl)
Step 8: place(yellow_block -> bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, bowl) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, bowl) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the orange block
the body of the orange block
the interior of the black bowl
the interior of the black bowl
the body of the yellow block
the body of the yellow block
the interior of the black bowl
the interior of the black bowl
